programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Kiko, Tootsie & Ginger, and Binkey
programme.desc: A bullying miniature pinscher moves to Camp Pendleton. A Chihuahua mix. Writer, actor and director Mike White’s French bulldogs are out of control.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Reggie, Diva, Rocco, & Vito, and Mugsy
programme.sub-title: Reggie, Diva, Rocco, & Vito, and Mugsy
programme.desc: Meet a feral dog who likes to guard pregnant horses on a ranch. English bulldog Rocco joins an existing pack and targets one of his brothers. A rescued pit bull terrier is a couch potato.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Luna and K9 Sniffers
programme.desc: A lab mix, has an extreme fear of dog parks, walks and noises at home. Meet a pack of dogs that spends its days keeping the port of Miami free of drugs, and explosives.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Willie, Make-A-Wish and Zena
programme.desc: A dog whose extreme fear of the stove has forced her owners to cook on a grill. Two dogs battle for control of the house. A Jack Russell terrier who can't handle the death of his pack leader.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Hudson & Orchid, and LA Animal Control
programme.sub-title: Hudson & Orchid, and LA Animal Control
programme.desc: Two Great Danes battle for control. Cesar helps the city of Los Angeles' Animal Control department with its aggressive new pet ownership program by riding along with one of its officers.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Gus, Abbey, and Vinnie
programme.desc: Tonight Show sidekick Ed McMahon’s dog is aggressive. A beagle won't leave the house. An Australian shepherd is so territorial of his owner's house that no one has visited in two years.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Caged Shepherd, Tinkling Terrier
programme.desc: Troy, a German Shepherd, is aggressive towards the other animals in his home. Roxie, a Rat Terrier, is so timid that when a sudden noise disturbs her, she’ll pee on the floor.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Widow’s Dogs, Drool Dog, Dexter Follow-up
programme.sub-title: Widow’s Dogs, Drool Dog, Dexter Follow-up
programme.desc: A retriever mix, and wire hair fox terriers siblings, have turned into a combative pack. A Sharpei/Dobie mix drools excessively. Rottie mix Dexter travels to Los Angeles for a refresher course.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: ATF Dog
programme.desc: Gavin, a decorated K-9 explosive sniffing agent for the Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, Firearms, and Explosives, is terrified of loud noises. Cesar uses some creative tactics to rehabilitate him.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: A Lack of Vision, Wound Up Rottie, Attack of the Peek-a-Poo
programme.sub-title: A Lack of Vision, Wound Up Rottie, Attack of the Peek-a-Poo
programme.desc: Cody, a blind Yorkshire terrier, is overly protective. Rottweiler Buffy has a dangerous obsession with the horses. Peek-a-Poo puppy Chloe, growls, snaps, and bites to get her way.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Beagle Mania, Rescue Me… Rescue You
programme.sub-title: Beagle Mania, Rescue Me… Rescue You
programme.desc: At six years old, beagle Gizmo has become very aggressive. Jennifer Lee Pryor runs Pryor’s Planet, a rescue organization to honor her late husband, comedian Richard Pryor.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Nightmare in Central Park, Bad Boy Baxter
programme.sub-title: Nightmare in Central Park, Bad Boy Baxter
programme.desc: Curly, an adopted lab-greyhound mix, is aggressive with other dogs. Rhodesian Ridgeback/Boxer mix Baxter is rescued after wandering the streets but has severe dog aggression.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Lives Changed
programme.desc: In this special episode, Cesar revisits some of the incredible Dog Whisperer stories of the past four years and shares his reactions to the changes in the lives of these special packs.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Wicked Dog, The Gospel According to Cesar, Cry Baby
programme.sub-title: Wicked Dog, The Gospel According to Cesar, Cry Baby
programme.desc: Wicked star Eden Espinosa’s Yorkshire Terrier, Owen, is creating drama. The Redemptorist brothers at Holy Redeemer College in Washington, D.C. needed a guard dog. Rocky, a rescue, can’t stop crying.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Made in Japan, Lawnmower Licker
programme.desc: Marley, a neglected Shiba Inu from Japan, develops aggression towards dogs and people. Piper, a Wire Fox Terrier obsessively tries to get to and lick the lawnmower engine.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Made in Japan, Lawnmower Licker
programme.desc: Marley, a neglected Shiba Inu from Japan, develops aggression towards dogs and people. Piper, a Wire Fox Terrier obsessively tries to get to and lick the lawnmower engine.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Doubt of a Shadow
programme.desc: Newly adopted Shadow starts to exhibit aggressive tendencies towards his family. A professional dog walker needs help with several of her clients.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Doubt of a Shadow
programme.desc: Newly adopted Shadow starts to exhibit aggressive tendencies towards his family. A professional dog walker needs help with several of her clients.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Anti-Social Sasha

programme.title: South Park: Den ostoppbare
programme.desc: Den för evigt oskyldige Butters är trött på hur han behandlas av sina föräldrar och anammar den nya vampyrfebern lite väl entusiastiskt.

programme.title: South Park: Döda kändisar
programme.desc: Ike plågas av övernaturliga krafter, så Kyle anlitar professionella spökjägare för att rädda sin lillebror.

programme.title: South Park: Zimmermans världskrig
programme.desc: Cartman anser Token vara ett hot mot hela mänskligheten.

programme.title: South Park: Mecha Streisand
programme.desc: Cartman och Kyle blir osams om en magisk triangel de hittar under en arkeologisk utgrävning. Triangeln har kraften att omvandla Barbra Streisand till ett otäckt monster.

programme.title: South Park: Regnskog bängskog
programme.desc: Pojkarna skickas till Costa Ricas regnskog som en del av kören Getting Gay With Kids turné.

programme.title: South Park: Glödhet katolsk kärlek
programme.desc: Fader Maxi reser till Rom när en skandal inom den katolska kyrkan får kyrkorna i South Park att stå halvtomma.

programme.title: South Park: Pandemin
programme.desc: South Park börjar likna Cloverfield när Randy visar dem skakiga inspelningar han gjort med sin videokamera av en stor mystisk varelse som härjar jorden runt.

programme.title: South Park: Pandemin II: Marsvinigt
programme.desc: Enorma marsvin anfaller städer runt om i världen. Pojkarna har nyckeln som kan rädda mänskligheten, men de sitter fast i Anderna.

programme.title: South Park: Mysterion reser sig
programme.desc: Mysterions hemliga identitet avslöjas. Samtidigt hånas Coon av sina Superhjältar och vill utkräva hämnd.

programme.title: South Park: Coon mot Coon och vänner
programme.desc: Coon och vänner är utlämnade till Cartmans nycker, eftersom han nu har mörkrets härskare Cthulhu i sin makt. Kenny kämpar mot sin superkrafts förbannelse i form av sitt alter ego.

programme.title: South Park: Den fattigaste
programme.desc: Kennys föräldrar grips av polisen och han hamnar i ett fosterhem - vilket gör Cartman till skolans fattigaste elev! Samtidigt återvänder en mystisk maskerad superhjälte från det förflutna.

programme.title: South Park: Mr. Hankey, julbajskorven
programme.desc: Borgmästaren bestämmer sig för att införa ett oförargligt helgtema som inte väcker anstöt hos någon. Kyle tror att han har svaret.

programme.title: South Park: Läskiga fisken
programme.desc: Sharon Marshs moster Flo har presenter till Shelly och Stan. Shelly får en fantastiskt stereo medan Stans present är en fisk som ser ganska läskig ut.

programme.title: South Park: Succuban
programme.desc: Cartman besöker optikern, en man som gör sig lustig över Cartmans viktproblem genom att kalla honom 'Piggy'.

programme.title: South Park: Chinpoko Mon
programme.desc: Stan, Cartman och Kenny är fast i den senaste trenden från Japan, en tecknad serie som heter Chinpokomon - men vad är den hemliga planen bakom programmets antiamerikanska motiv?

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: När Wall-Mart omvandlar South Park till en spökstad försöker Stan och Kyle förstöra affären, men en besatt Cartman ställer sig i vägen.

programme.desc: När Stan tvingas gå till skolrådgivaren för att han samlar på sig så mycket onödigt, upptäcker han att mr Mackey också har problem med det.

programme.desc: Cavender, an angel trying to win his wings, tries to help down-on-her-luck Agnes, who has just been fired.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Changing of the Guard
programme.desc: An elderly private school teacher wonders if his life has meant anything as he contemplates suicide on Christmas Eve and is reminded by former students that he has, indeed, had an impact on their lives.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: In Praise Of Pip
programme.desc: An alcoholic bookie regrets that he wasn't a better father to his son, Pip, critically wounded in South Vietnam. A visit to an amusement park gives them both a second chance.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Steel
programme.desc: Boxing robot "Battling Maxo" breaks down before the scheduled bout, forcing his manager to take its place.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Blue Scorpion
programme.desc: The emergence of the elusive Blue Scorpion leads anthropology professor Jeff Storck (Chris O'Dowd) to his most personal research project yet.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Blurryman
programme.desc: Writer Sophie Gelson (Zazie Beetz) is haunted by a mysterious figure. Seth Rogen and Betty Gabriel guest star.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Nightmare at 20,000 Feet
programme.desc: Mr. Wilson believes he sees a gremlin on the wing of the commercial aircraft he is taking back home... from the sanitarium, where he has been committed for six months after a mental breakdown during a similar flight.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: A Kind of a Stopwatch
programme.desc: Patrick Thomas McNulty, a long-winded and self-absorbed know-it-all, is given a fantastic device which brings literal meaning to the expression "stop the world; I want to get off."

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Last Night of a Jockey
programme.sub-title: The Last Night of a Jockey
programme.desc: A dejected jockey wants to be tall.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Living Doll
programme.desc: Erich is displeased when his wife buys an expensive doll for his step-daughter. He becomes even more displeased when the doll tells him it doesn't like him!

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Meet in the Middle
programme.desc: Lonely bachelor Phil (Jimmi Simpson) finds meaningful human connection when he discovers a telepathic link to a stranger named Annie (Gillian Jacobs). Their connection quickly sparks a romance.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Downtime
programme.desc: After a recent promotion to hotel manager, Michelle (Morena Baccarin) feels like she's on top of the world, but any cause for celebration is short lived when the nature of her reality is called into question. Colman Domingo and Tony Hale also guest star.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Old Man in the Cave
programme.sub-title: The Old Man in the Cave
programme.desc: A mysterious guardian helps a tiny community survive after the Bomb destroys much of the Earth.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Uncle Simon
programme.desc: Barbara accidentally causes her cruel Uncle Simon's death. His will stipulates that she must care for his latest invention - a robot. The robot begins to take on Uncle Simon's traits.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Probe 7, Over and Out
programme.desc: The lone survivors of two annihilated worlds are stranded on a distant planet.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The 7th is Made Up of Phantoms
programme.sub-title: The 7th is Made Up of Phantoms
programme.desc: Three National Guardsmen explore the site of Custer's Last Stand and encounter mysterious phenomenon that hint at the original battle occurring just out of sight.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Who of You
programme.desc: Struggling actor Harry (Ethan Embry) risks everything to catch his big break, but an impulsive scheme takes a few turns no one saw coming. Daniel Sunjata and Billy Porter also guest star.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Ovation
programme.desc: The music career of struggling singer Jasmine takes off overnight after she witnesses a tragic incident. Jasmine begins receiving rapturous applause everywhere she goes, but she soon realizes the relentless recognition comes at a steep cost.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: A Short Drink from a Certain Fountain
programme.sub-title: A Short Drink from a Certain Fountain
programme.desc: Trying to keep up with his younger wife, Harmon convinces his brother to inject him with an experimental youth serum.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Ninety Years Without Slumbering
programme.desc: An old man fears that he will die if his grandfather clock stops running.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Ring-A-Ding Girl
programme.desc: Bunny receives a ring from her fan club in her home town. In the ring she sees the faces of people from her hometown telling her she's needed there so she returns home.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: You Drive
programme.desc: Driving home one rainy evening, Oliver Pope accidentally hits a boy on a bicycle. Pope flees the scene, determined to hide his guilt, but his car has other ideas.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Among The Untrodden
programme.desc: Transfer student Irene's (Sophia Macy) unusual interests make her an easy target at her new all-girls boarding school until she discovers that popular classmate Madison (Abbie Hern) possesses a unique talent.
